name: Fire King Avatar Rangbali
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>炎</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>えん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>王</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>獣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> ハヌマーン
desc: If a face-up "Fire King" monster(s) you control is destroyed by card effect (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your hand. When a Spell/Trap Card or effect is activated, while this card is on the field (Quick Effect): You can negate the activation, and if you do, destroy 1 other FIRE monster in your hand or face-up field. You can only use each effect of "Fire King Avatar Rangbali" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If a face-up "Fire King" monster(s) you control is destroyed by card effect (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your hand. When a Spell/Trap Card or effect is activated, while this card is on the field (Quick Effect): You can negate the activation, and if you do, destroy 1 other FIRE monster in your hand or face-up field. You can only use each effect of "Fire King Avatar Rangbali" once per turn.
eff: If a face-up "Fire King" monster(s) you control is destroyed by card effect (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your hand. When a Spell/Trap Card or effect is activated, while this card is on the field (Quick Effect): You can negate the activation, and if you do, destroy 1 other FIRE monster in your hand or face-up field. You can only use each effect of "Fire King Avatar Rangbali" once per turn.

jp_sets.set: Structure Deck R: Onslaught of the Fire Kings

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
mst: Negates the activation of Spell Cards
Negates the activation of Trap Cards
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
